name: Polarizing Mace
description:
Even grasping the amber handle of this +1 striking shock light mace makes your hair stand on end.

Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Requirements The wielder of a grounding spike is within 30 feet

Effect A great surge of electricity connects your paired weapons. All creatures in a line between you and the wielder of the grounding spike take |options:area-damage] ().

Special The polarizing mace pairs with the .
